# WatchNations

WatchNations is a free web application for discovering publicly available live TV channels and radio stations from around the world.

Primary URL: https://watchnations.com/

## What The Site Does

- Helps users browse live TV channels by country.
- Provides an interactive 3D globe for country discovery.
- Lets users browse channel categories such as news, sports, music, movies, kids, weather, and education.
- Provides radio station discovery by country.
- Stores favorite channels locally in the user's browser.

## Content Policy

WatchNations does not host, upload, broadcast, or control video streams. The site organizes and links to publicly available external sources in good faith.

Copyright and DMCA requests can be sent to: lindaraymane@gmail.com

## Important Pages

- Home: https://watchnations.com/
- Sitemap: https://watchnations.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://watchnations.com/robots.txt

## Best Summary

WatchNations is a fast, free, global live TV and radio discovery platform with country browsing, category browsing, favorites, and an interactive globe.
